titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Chubb Fellowship Program, Yale University, Records
Chubb Fellowship Program, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday May 14, 2020 at 08:28
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Chubb Fellowship Program, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of audiotapes, motion picture film, and posters documenting speeches and presentations delivered by fellows of the Chubb Fellowship, Yale University. Includes a 1990 address given by Fernando Collor, president of Brazil.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 13-G-3 (YRG 13-G-3), Records of the fellows of Timothy Dwight College.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are partially restricted due to law, university policy or fragility. Any restricted material will be noted as such.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Chubb Fellowship Program, Yale University, Records (RU 855). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of audiotapes, motion picture film, and posters documenting speeches and presentations delivered by fellows of the Chubb Fellowship, Yale University. Includes a 1990 address given by Fernando Collor, president of Brazil.

did.unittitle: Motion picture film of Chubb Fellowship lectures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Reappraised and processed by Barbara Fiddler and Stephen Cohen, 2002.

Note: Films and production records listed below, were originally attributed to Yale University Films since Manuscripts and Archives staff packed up their records in 1991. Research on the films reveals them to come from various units on campus. Because of the medium, they all ended up at Yale University Films. The films are now reassigned to RUs that more accurately reflect their creation and original purpose.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

did.unittitle: Chubb Fellowship address, "The Government's Action in Modernizing Brazil," given by H.E. Mr. Fernando Collor, President of Brazil
Chubb Fellowship address, "The Government's Action in Modernizing Brazil," given by H.E. Mr. Fernando Collor, President of Brazil
Audiotape, videotape, and motion picture film of Chubb Fellows

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

did.unittitle: Fernando Collor de Mello, President of Brazil, 2 Tapes

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The administrative records are restricted until January 1, 2046, as established by Yale Corporation.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The administrative records are restricted until January 1, 2046, as established by Yale Corporation.

accessrestrict.p: The administrative records are restricted until January 1, 2046, as established by Yale Corporation.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

did.unittitle: Senator Humphrey reel 2 (question and answer session)

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
